title: Eminent Domiciles
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Eminent Domiciles''''' was a [[Holovid/Legends|holovid]] program that showcased the greatest private residences in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

[[Shu Mai/Legends|Shu Mai's]] appearance on the show prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] allowed [[Ekria/Legends|Ekria]] to learn weaknesses in the Presidente's compound outside [[Kway Teow/Legends|Kway Teow]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Reversal of Fortune]]'' {{Mo}}

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
